set-payload.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/xml var fields = vars.fieldsToMask var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******" fun maskFields(inputData, fieldHierarchy: Array, maskChar: String) = if (inputData is Array) inputData map (item) -> maskFields(item,fieldHierarchy,maskChar) else if (inputData is Object) inputData mapObject ((value, key) -> if (fieldHierarchy contains key as String) if (sizeOf(fieldHierarchy) == 1) (key): maskChar else (key): maskFields(value, fieldHierarchy[1 to -1],maskChar) else (key): value ) else inputData
var splitFields= (fields splitBy ",") map (trim($) splitBy ".")
var initialIndex= 0
fun xBasedMasking(inData: Any,initIndex: Number)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initIndex) inData else xBasedMasking((maskFields(inData,splitFields[initIndex],maskChar)), initIndex+1) else inData
--- xBasedMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var fields = vars.fieldsToMask var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******" fun maskFields(inputData, fieldHierarchy: Array, maskChar: String) = if (inputData is Array) inputData map (item) -> maskFields(item,fieldHierarchy,maskChar) else if (inputData is Object) inputData mapObject ((value, key) -> if (fieldHierarchy contains key as String) if (sizeOf(fieldHierarchy) == 1) (key): maskChar else (key): maskFields(value, fieldHierarchy[1 to -1],maskChar) else (key): value ) else inputData
var splitFields= (fields splitBy ",") map (trim($) splitBy ".")
var initialIndex= 0
fun xBasedMasking(inData: Any,initIndex: Number)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initIndex) inData else xBasedMasking((maskFields(inData,splitFields[initIndex],maskChar)), initIndex+1) else inData
--- xBasedMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

#[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::util::Values output application/csv
var fields = vars.fieldsToMask
var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******"
var splitFields = fields splitBy "," map trim($)
var initialIndex=0
fun csvMasking(inData,initialIndex)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initialIndex) inData else csvMasking((inData mask splitFields[initialIndex] with maskChar),initialIndex + 1) else inData
--- csvMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

#[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::util::Values output application/csv
var fields = vars.fieldsToMask
var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******"
var splitFields = fields splitBy "," map trim($)
var initialIndex=0
fun csvMasking(inData,initialIndex)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initialIndex) inData else csvMasking((inData mask splitFields[initialIndex] with maskChar),initialIndex + 1) else inData
--- csvMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

logger.message: Applying Path Based Masking over Error Response Payload

set-payload.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/xml var fields = vars.fieldsToMask var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******" fun maskFields(inputData, fieldHierarchy: Array, maskChar: String) = if (inputData is Array) inputData map (item) -> maskFields(item,fieldHierarchy,maskChar) else if (inputData is Object) inputData mapObject ((value, key) -> if (fieldHierarchy contains key as String) if (sizeOf(fieldHierarchy) == 1) (key): maskChar else (key): maskFields(value, fieldHierarchy[1 to -1],maskChar) else (key): value ) else inputData
var splitFields= (fields splitBy ",") map (trim($) splitBy ".")
var initialIndex= 0
fun xBasedMasking(inData: Any,initIndex: Number)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initIndex) inData else xBasedMasking((maskFields(inData,splitFields[initIndex],maskChar)), initIndex+1) else inData
--- xBasedMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var fields = vars.fieldsToMask var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******" fun maskFields(inputData, fieldHierarchy: Array, maskChar: String) = if (inputData is Array) inputData map (item) -> maskFields(item,fieldHierarchy,maskChar) else if (inputData is Object) inputData mapObject ((value, key) -> if (fieldHierarchy contains key as String) if (sizeOf(fieldHierarchy) == 1) (key): maskChar else (key): maskFields(value, fieldHierarchy[1 to -1],maskChar) else (key): value ) else inputData
var splitFields= (fields splitBy ",") map (trim($) splitBy ".")
var initialIndex= 0
fun xBasedMasking(inData: Any,initIndex: Number)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initIndex) inData else xBasedMasking((maskFields(inData,splitFields[initIndex],maskChar)), initIndex+1) else inData
--- xBasedMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

#[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::util::Values output application/csv
var fields = vars.fieldsToMask
var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******"
var splitFields = fields splitBy "," map trim($)
var initialIndex=0
fun csvMasking(inData,initialIndex)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initialIndex) inData else csvMasking((inData mask splitFields[initialIndex] with maskChar),initialIndex + 1) else inData
--- csvMasking(payload,initialIndex)]

logger.message: Applying Generic Masking over Error Response Payload

set-payload.value:
#[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::util::Values output application/csv
var fields = vars.fieldsToMask
var maskChar = vars.maskCharacters default "*******"
var splitFields = fields splitBy "," map trim($)
var initialIndex=0
fun csvMasking(inData,initialIndex)= if(splitFields != null) if(sizeOf(splitFields) == initialIndex) inData else csvMasking((inData mask splitFields[initialIndex] with maskChar),initialIndex + 1) else inData
--- csvMasking(payload,initialIndex)]
